palm-hearts-salad-with-avocado-and-fresh.name: Palm Hearts Salad With Avocado: And Fresh Recipe
palm-hearts-salad-with-avocado-and-fresh.original_name: Ensalada de palmitos con aguacate: receta fácil y fresca

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de cilantro o perejil fresco (picado)
1/4 taza de aceite de oliva  (extra virgen)
1/4 taza de queso feta desmoronado o nueces  ((opcional))

instructions: Drain palms and cut them into slices about 1 cm thick.
Pela el aguacate y cortarlo en cubos medianos.
Corta la cebolla morada en rodajas finas y los tomates cherry por la mitad.
In a small bowl, mix lemon juice, Dijon mustard, honey, salt and pepper.
Incorpora el aceite de oliva poco a poco mientras se bate para emulsionar la vinagreta.
En un bol grande, mezcla los palmitos, el aguacate, la cebolla morada y los tomates cherry.
Agrega el aderezo y mezcla suavemente para no deshacer el aguacate.
Espolvorea con cilantro o perejil fresco picado.
Optional, add Feta cheese or minced nuts to give more flavor and texture.
Sirve inmediatamente para disfrutar de su frescura.

pan-roasted-chicken-with-pineapple-chile.name: Pan-roasted Chicken With Pineapple-chile Glaze
instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 425°. Mix coriander, cumin, and cayenne in a small bowl. Sprinkle chicken with spice mixture, pressing to adhere; season with salt and pepper.

Heat oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken, skin side down, until browned and beginning to crisp, about 5 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate and arrange pineapple slices in pan. Place chicken, skin side up, on top. Transfer to oven and roast until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 40–45 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring chile, garlic, pineapple juice, vinegar, brown sugar, and paprika to a boil in a small saucepan and cook until thickened and syrupy, 12–15 minutes; season glaze with salt.

When chicken is done, brush with glaze and roast just until glaze is bubbling, about 2 minutes; repeat with any remaining glaze. Transfer chicken and pineapple to a cutting board; let rest 10 minutes. Serve chicken and pineapple with any juices from skillet alongside.

pancake-mix.name: Pancake Mix
instructions: Combine flour, powdered milk, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl; stir to blend. Store mixture in an airtight container and use within 8 months.

pani-puri-traditional-indian-recipe-pequ.name: Pani Puri (traditional Indian Recipe)

ingredients.item: 110 g (3 / 4 cup) semolin (you can buy here)
1 cucharadita de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 teaspoon ground cayenne (you can buy here)
Una cucharada de cilantro fresco picado
1 teaspoon of chaat masala (you can buy here)
A abundant handful of fresh mint leaves
3 tablespoons of tamarind dough (you can buy here)
1 cucharada al ras de cayena molida
1 teaspoon to ra ginger powder (you can buy here)

instructions: In a bowl we mix semolin with flour and a pint of salt. We'll get hot water and loving till we get a dough that doesn't stick to our hands we'll add an oil chorrit and amasamos 3 or 4 more minutes. We leave to stand, covered with film or with a cloth, for 30 minutes. We divide the dough into balls the size of a nut or a little smaller.
We heat up abundant oil in a pan. We're frying the dough balls, and after they're inflamed and golden we get them back into a plate with absorbent paper.

We peel the potatoes and cook them whole with salt water. When they're tender, we scold them and we put them up with a fork. We condiminate with cayenne, chaat masala and minced cilantro. We add chickpeas and minced onion and mix well.
In a kitchen robot we shredded the mint with tamarind dough, ginger, sugar, cayenne and salt. We put the water and lemon juice into a bowl, add the spicy and mint dough and mix well.

pappardelle-with-arugula-and-prosciutto.name: Pappardelle With Arugula And Prosciutto

ingredients.prep: white and pale greens only, halved lengthwise, thinly sliced crosswise

ingredients.item: Finely grated lemon zest plus more for serving

ingredients.prep: thick stems trimmed, tleaves torn (about 4 cups)

ingredients.item: Finely grated parmesan plus more for serving

instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.
Meanwhile, heat oil and butter in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add leeks and cook, stirring often, until softened but not browned, 5-8 minutes.

Add pasta, chives, 2 teaspoons lemon zest, and 3/4 cup pasta cooking liquid. Cook, tossing and adding more cooking liquid by 1/4-cupfuls as needed, until a glossy sauce forms that coats pasta, about 4 minutes.
Add arugula and 1/3 cup Parmesan, season with salt and pepper, and toss to combine. Add prosciutto and toss again. Top pasta with more lemon zest and Parmesan.

paprika.name: Paprika
instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and crumble. Reserve 1 tablespoon bacon grease in the skillet.

Season chicken pieces with salt and pepper. Place chicken in the skillet with bacon grease and cook over high heat until chicken is golden brown on all sides, about 10 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate.

Cook and stir onions in the same skillet until softened, 5 to 10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and stir paprika and caraway seeds into onions; add chicken. Cover skillet and cook for 30 minutes. Add potatoes to chicken mixture, cover skillet, and cook until potatoes are tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 30 more minutes. Transfer chicken and potatoes to a serving dish.
Stir sour cream, parsley, and garlic powder into the same skillet until sauce is smooth and creamy, 3 to 5 minutes. Pour sauce over chicken and potatoes and sprinkle with bacon.

instructions: 1. All thoroughly kneading material in one container.
2. U with a dump cloth let the car rest for 15 minutes.
3. Inner tribute inner roast the water in its own oil attracting.

10. Open pick the dough you're in the oil to the oven container.
11. 11. 11. 11. The dough that you've eaten u add meat water and mined mortar to them; all dough topste index.
12. For 10 minutes in the oven heated 180 degrees.
12. August U do hot service by offering yogurt and fine snacks.

pasta-meatballs-lezzet.name: Pasta Meatballs
instructions: 1. You can eat and drink until the cake is cooked in plenty of salty water.
2. melt the butter in the pan.
3. Add and roast until you wrap.
4. Hot milk cook until the azar is eaten and put it in.

pasta-with-canned-sardines-and-tomato-th.name: Pasta With Canned Sardines And Tomato: The Secret To A Dinner
pasta-with-canned-sardines-and-tomato-th.original_name: Pasta con sardinas de lata y tomate: El secreto de una cena rápida

ingredients.item: 200 g de espaguetis (preferiblemente de trigo duro de calidad.)
1  lata de sardinas (en tomate o en aceite de oliva virgen.)
200 g de tomate triturado o tomates cherry cortados por la mitad.
2  dientes de ajo laminados (el alma del sofrito.)
1  guindilla o chile seco (opcional, para el toque siciliano.)
A half lemon (the secret to balance fat)
Sal (pimienta negra y perejil fresco picado.)

instructions: Eat the spaghetti with abundant salt water. The secret of chefs is to get them out a minute earlier than the package indicates. Crucial: Always reserve a cup of cooking water and that starching fluid will create a bound and sedated salsa, and not a soup.

In a large frying pan, heat up the AOVE with laminated garlic and a glove. When garlic starts to dance and release its smell (without burning), add tomato. Cooking at medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes until tomato changes to an intense red and lose water.

Add the sardines. If they come in quality oil, add that oil to the frying pan as well. Do not pat them and use the wooden spoon to break them into large and visible pieces. Let them get hot for a minute to get their taste out at the tomato base.

Incorporates spaghetti directly from the pot to frying pan. Add a chorrit of reserved cooking water and remove with energy. See how tomato and sardine fat turn into a cream that embraces the dough. It ends with the lemon and fresh parsley.

pastrami-sandwich-argiro.name: Pastrami Sandwich

ingredients.item: A little sour cabbage well drained
A little sour cabbage well drained

instructions: First, brush the bread slices externally with some butter.
Bake from the buttery side in an anti-stick vessel for 2-3 minutes in medium intensity, to brown and become crispy.
Then turn and bake for 1 minute to heat the bread.
We put them on a tray with the crisp side on the outside.
Brush the bottom slices with mustard inside.
Spread on the two slices of 3-4 slices of pastrami.
Balance the grated cheese on a hill at 4 slices of bread.
Place on the grill in a hot oven for 2 minutes to melt the cheese and complete with the remaining ingredients.
Add caramelized onion, pickles and if you want some sour cabbage drained.
We close the sandwiches and cut them in half.
Serve immediately while the cheese is warm and runs.

pea-pie-lezzet.name: Pea Pie

ingredients.item: 1 and half water glass hot water

instructions: 1. Peel potatoes and bark and chop cube cube.
2. Peel onions and off.
3. Heat the olive oil in the pan and roast onion.
4. Add Carrot, potatoes and peas and continue roasting.
5. Add water and close the cover of the pot and cook until the vegetables soften.
6. melt and spark the butter.
7. Cut each yufka into 4 equal square parts.
8. The square softeners dörder is placed on the ball and rub the butter melted into the breaks.
9. Share the mix of peasants and close them like bohça.
10. The floor places index to the tray to stay at the bottom.
11. 11. Cook the butter left to the base and cook for 25 minutes in the oven with a pre-heated 180 degree.
12. Serve.

peach-guacamole.name: Peach Guacamole
instructions: Mash avocados in a small bowl. Stir in lime juice and ancho chile powder; season with salt. Stir in peach, red onion, cilantro, and jalapeño.

peanut-butter-microwave-fudge.name: Peanut Butter Microwave Fudge
instructions: Line a baking dish with parchment or waxed paper.

Place peanut butter and butter in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave at high power in 30-second intervals until melted and thoroughly combined, stirring after each interval. Cool mixture for 2 to 3 minutes.
Stir in confectioners' sugar, ½ cup at a time, until well incorporated. Press mixture into the prepared dish; place in the refrigerator. Chill for at least 2 hours to overnight for a firmer fudge.

peanut-butter-protein-box.name: Peanut Butter Protein Box
instructions: Add the apples, celery, and pretzels to a lunch box. Add a scoop of peanut butter.
Enjoy!

peanut-butter-spider-cookies.name: Peanut Butter Spider Cookies

ingredients.item: Chocolate candy spheres with smooth chocolate filling (such as lindt lindor truffles)

instructions: Beat shortening, peanut butter, brown sugar, and ½ cup white sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Beat egg into the creamy mixture until fully incorporated. Stir milk and vanilla extract into the mixture until smooth.
Mix flour, baking soda, and salt together in a small bowl; add to peanut butter mixture in the large bowl and stir until completely incorporated into a dough.
Divide and shape dough into 48 balls.
Spread 1/4 cup white sugar into a wide, shallow bowl. Roll dough balls in sugar to coat and arrange about 2 inches apart onto prepared baking sheets.

Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Remove cookies from oven and quickly press a dimple into the center of each cookie using the blunt end of a wooden spoon. Cool cookies on sheets for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire cooling rack to cool completely.
Cut each chocolate truffle in half. Put one piece atop each cookie with the rounded side facing upwards.

Spoon frosting into a piping bag fitted with a small round tip, or use a resealable plastic bag with a corner snipped off. Dab a small amount of frosting onto the back of each candy eyeball and stick two onto each chocolate candy to resemble eyes. Then pipe frosting in four thin lines, starting at the base of the candy, on each side atop the cookie to resemble spider legs.
Let frosting harden at room temperature, about 30 minutes. Store cookies in an airtight container.

peanut-butter-braised-chicken-and-greens.name: Peanut-butter-braised Chicken And Greens

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into 3" pieces

ingredients.item: . plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 4 tsp. morton kosher salt
Steamed white rice and lemon wedges

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Remove ribs and stems from 1 large bunch collard greens and finely chop, then chop leaves. Set aside.

Sprinkle 3 lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs, cut into 3" pieces, on both sides with 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Heat 3 Tbsp. avocado oil or vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Working in batches if needed, cook chicken, turning occasionally, until golden but not cooked through, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate.

Reduce heat to medium. Cook 2 medium red onions, thinly sliced, 15 large garlic cloves, finely chopped, and remaining 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in pot, stirring occasionally, until tender and golden, about 5 minutes. Add 1 Scotch bonnet or habanero chile, finely chopped, and ¼ cup tomato paste; cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add one 14.5-oz. can diced tomatoes, ½ cup natural peanut butter, 1 Tbsp. chipotle chile powder, and 1 Tbsp. dried thyme, then pour in 2 cups unsweetened coconut milk (from two 13.5-oz. cans). Mix well; bring to a simmer. Add reserved greens; return chicken to pot. Cover and transfer to oven. Braise until greens are tender and chicken is cooked through, 30–35 minutes.
Serve chicken and greens with steamed white rice and lemon wedges for squeezing over.

pecan-cajun-cake.name: Pecan Cajun Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Grease an 11x14-inch baking dish.
Mix flour, pineapple, 1 1/2 cups white sugar, eggs, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl; pour into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
Combine 1 cup sugar, evaporated milk, and margarine together in a saucepan; bring to a boil for 1 minute. Remove saucepan from heat and stir pecans and vanilla extract into sugar mixture.
Pierce the top of the cake with a toothpick and spread pecan topping over cake.

pecan-cake.name: Pecan Cake

ingredients.item: Nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter
Diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Lay a sheet of parchment paper on base of pan. Place band on top and clamp sides shut so they hold parchment in place. Lightly coat parchment and sides of pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter, room temperature. Toast 8 oz. raw pecan halves (about 2 cups) on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened in color and fragrant (you want them on the lighter side as they will continue to toast later when you bake them on top of the cake), 8–10 minutes. Let cool.

Beat 2¼ cups (281 g) all-purpose flour, 1½ cups (300 g) granulated sugar, 2½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, and ½ tsp. freshly grated nutmeg in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed to combine, about 1 minute. Add ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter; beat until mixture is sandy with no visible butter pieces remaining, about 45 seconds. Add ¾ cup whole milk and 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract and beat until smooth and fluffy, about 2 minutes (this mixing time will help keep the cake from sinking later; don’t worry about overmixing). Add 3 large eggs one at a time, beating 30 seconds after each addition; batter should be smooth and creamy. Scrape into prepared pan and arrange pecans in a single layer on top, pressing in gently to adhere.

Set pan on a rimmed baking sheet and bake cake until a wooden tester inserted into the center comes out with only a few moist crumbs attached (don't worry if the cake puffs up a bit and is slightly domed; that's normal), 50–60 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan.

While the cake is cooling, cook 1 cup (packed; 200 g) dark brown sugar, ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter, cut into 1" pieces, ½ cup heavy cream, ¼ cup bourbon or water, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium saucepan over medium heat, whisking often, until thick enough to coat a spoon, 8–10 minutes. Let glaze cool.

Pour half of glaze over cake in pan. Let sit 15 minutes. Unmold cake; transfer to a cake stand or large plate. Serve with remaining glaze for drizzling over.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Cover cake and remaining glaze separately and chill. Let both sit at room temperature 1 hour before serving.

persian-rice.name: Persian Rice
instructions: Place rice in a medium saucepan; add 2 tsp. salt and cold water to cover by 2 inches. Bring to a boil over medium heat; reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes. Drain rice, reserving 3/4 cup cooking liquid.

Place saffron and 1/2 cup reserved cooking liquid in a small bowl; let saffron soften for 5 minutes. Place yogurt in a medium bowl and stir in remaining 1 tsp. salt and saffron water. Add rice and stir to coat.

Melt butter in a large deep nonstick skillet over medium heat; swirl to coat bottom and sides of pan. Add rice, mounding slightly in center. Poke 6–7 holes in rice with the end of a wooden spoon. Cover with foil, then a lid. Cook, rotating skillet over burner for even cooking, for 10 minutes (do not stir). Reduce heat to low; cook, adding more reserved cooking liquid by tablespoonfuls if rice has not finished cooking when water evaporates, until a golden brown crust forms on bottom of rice, 20–25 minutes.
Remove lid and foil; invert a plate over skillet. Using oven mitts, carefully invert rice onto plate; use a heatproof spatula to remove any crust remaining in skillet.

philadelphia-vanilla-mousse-cheesecake.name: Philadelphia Vanilla Mousse Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (162 degrees C).
Mix together wafer crumbs and melted butter in a medium bowl until well combined; press onto the bottom of 9-inch springform pan.

Beat together 3 cream cheese packages, 3/4 cup sugar, and 3 teaspoons vanilla in a large bowl with an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing on low speed after each addition until blended. Pour batter over crust in the pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until the center is almost set, 50 to 55 minutes. Run a knife around the rim of the pan to loosen cheesecake; cool completely in the pan.

Beat remaining cream cheese package, 1/4 cup sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in another large bowl with the electric mixer until well blended. Whisk in COOL WHIP until incorporated. Spread mixture over cooled cheesecake.
Refrigerate for 4 hours. Remove the rim of the pan before serving.

philly-cheesesteak-lasagna.name: Philly Cheesesteak Lasagna

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine flank steak, onions, bell peppers, and mushrooms in a large resealable plastic bag. Add Worcestershire sauce, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Seal and let marinate in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, place lasagna noodles into a 9x13-inch baking dish. Cover with hot water and let soak until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain noodles in a colander, then dry the baking dish and grease with cooking spray.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Transfer marinated steak to a large baking sheet and discard marinade. Arrange onions, bell peppers, and mushrooms around steak.

Bake in the preheated oven until steak starts to brown, 15 to 20 minutes. Turn on the broiler and broil until steak darkens, about 5 minutes. Remove from the oven and return the heat to 177°C (175 degrees C). Slice steak into thin pieces when cool enough to handle.
Combine spaghetti sauce and garlic powder in a large skillet over medium-low heat. Stir in sliced flank steak. Add onions, bell peppers, and mushrooms. Remove from the heat.
Mix ricotta, 1/2 of the mozzarella, Parmesan, egg, and parsley together in a bowl.

Spread 2 cups sauce mixture in the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Top with four lasagna noodles. Cover noodles with 1/3 of the ricotta mixture, 2 cups sauce mixture, and 1/3 of the provolone. Repeat layers twice. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella on top. Cover the baking dish with greased aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbling, about 45 minutes. Uncover and continue baking until mozzarella cheese is browned, about 15 minutes. Let stand for 15 minutes before cutting and serving.

pickled-eggplant-lezzet.name: Pickled Eggplant
instructions: 1. Carefully wash and wash the undressyeye of eggs and ends 4 equal parts.
2. Add water to a large pot.
3. Add eggplants to boiling water and sprinkle until soften.
4. Inner of a pot of salt eggs;ine topste index.
5. Price to leave the dark water by putting a weight on the car 3-4 hours.
6. Kü with cabbage, pepper, parsley, garlic; vanilla cubes-shaped carrots.
7. Fill the mixture that you prepare for the cut portions of the eggplants, wrap it with yeast stems and put it in the jar.
8. Calculate the water of the bottle until the water will be taken.
9.  Bu suya her litresine 1.
10. 5 tablespoons of rock salt in the future and boil and leave to cool.
11. 11. 11. 11. Add water to the vinegar into the water and add to the water u you're going to pour.
12. Wait for 1 month by tightly closing the cover of the jar.
12. August No matter.

pina-colada-bread-pudding.name: Pina Colada Bread Pudding
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine 1 1/2 fluid ounces pineapple juice, 1/3 cup coconut, brown sugar, melted butter, and rum in a bowl; pour into the bottom of a 2 1/2-quart casserole dish. Place bread cubes on top.

Combine coconut milk beverage, eggs, remaining 4 1/2 fluid ounces pineapple juice, orange juice, remaining 1/3 cup coconut, white sugar, 2 teaspoons cinnamon, and nutmeg in large bowl; pour over bread cubes and sprinkle with a little cinnamon.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes.

pizza-fondue.name: Pizza Fondue
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Saute onion in hot oil until soft and translucent, 4 to 6 minutes.
Heat a large pot over medium-high heat. Cook and stir beef in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes; drain and discard grease.

Stir beef, onion, and pizza sauce together in the same pot over medium-high heat. Add mozzarella cheese and Cheddar cheese one handful at a time, stirring until cheeses melt into the fondue before adding the next handfuls. Ladle fondue into bowls.

pj.name: Pj

ingredients.item: Sweetened tropical punch flavored drink mix powder

instructions: In a 5 gallon container, combine grain alcohol, pineapple juice, cherry juice, drink mix powder and water.
Add apples, oranges, grapes, strawberries, lemons and limes.
Stir gently and serve.

poached-apples-with-vanilla-yogurt.name: Poached Apples With Vanilla Yogurt

ingredients.prep: Golden Delicious, or Braeburn apples, peeled, cored

instructions: Combine wine, sugar, orange juice, orange peel, lemon peel, cinnamon stick, star anise, and 2 cups water in a large heavy saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Add apples; reduce heat to low and simmer, occasionally rotating apples, until tender when pierced with a sharp knife, 25–30 minutes.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer apples to a plate and set aside. Strain poaching liquid in pan into a small saucepan, discarding solids in strainer. Set saucepan over medium-high heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until poaching liquid is syrupy and reduced to about 3/4 cup, 10–15 minutes (syrup will thicken as it cools).
Combine yogurt and honey in a small bowl. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; whisk until the yogurt sauce is smooth and well blended.
Divide yogurt sauce among plates. Place warm apples on top. Drizzle syrup over.

poached-chicken-crunchy-vegetables-and-h.name: Poached Chicken, Crunchy Vegetables, And Herb Dressing

ingredients.prep: basil, parsley and tarragon, leaves picked and stalks set aside

ingredients.item: A handful (approx. 1/4 pound) of green beans

instructions: Drain and rinse the almonds in fresh cold water, then pound them with the herbs, the garlic clove and a little salt. Slowly pour the olive oil into the mixture, stirring to combine.

Put the chicken breasts into a pan of cold water with the reserved herb stalks (from the dressing), the garlic and the salt. Bring the water to a simmer, turn off the heat and immediately cover the pan. Allow the chicken to sit in the hot poaching liquor for 20 minutes, until cooked through.
Bring a medium saucepan of salted water to a boil and blanch the green beans for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, then cool under cold running water. Transfer to a large mixing bowl.

Preheat the broiler. Shave the fennel bulb with a mandolin or peeler into this slices and do the same with the carrot and zucchini. Add to the beans. Put the tomatoes on a non-stick baking sheet and under a preheated broiler for 2 to 3 minutes until softened. Add to the bowl.

Remove the chicken breasts from the poaching liquor. Thinly slice them and add to the bowl of vegetables. Toss together and season to taste with salt and pepper.  Arrange the chicken and vegetables between plates and serve with the herb dressing and lemon wedges.

poached-seckel-pear-with-pomegranate-cab.name: Poached Seckel Pear With Pomegranate, Cabrales Cheese, And Szechuan Pepper Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tbsp (250 g/8.8 oz) heavy cream
Plus 1 tsp (20 g/0.7 oz) szechuan peppercorns
Plus 2 tbsp (180 g/6.3 oz) granulated sugar
To 5 turns freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: peeled (you will core them after they are poached)

ingredients.item: (500 g/17.6 oz) poaching liquid from poached pears with pomegranate
Plus 2 tbsp (125 g/4.4 oz) granulated sugar
Plus 1 tsp (10 g/0.35 oz) all-purpose flour
Ice cream machine; pepper mill; 9-inch square baking pan; 2-inch-long by 1-inchwide diamond-shaped pastry cutter

instructions: 1. In a medium saucepan, combine the milk, cream, and peppercorns and cook over medium-high heat until the mixture comes to a gentle boil. Remove the pan from the heat, cover, and allow to infuse for 20 minutes.
2. Strain the milk mixture and return it to the saucepan. Reheat until the mixture just begins to boil. Remove from the heat.

3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and sugar vigorously until pale. Whisk about 1/2 cup of the hot milk mixture into the yolks, then return this mixture to the saucepan with the remaining milk mixture and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until it thickens enough to coat the back of the spoon and reaches 79°C (79°C) on an instant-read thermometer; do not let the mixture boil, or the egg yolks will curdle. Remove the pot from the heat. Pass the ice cream base through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl. Set the bowl in an ice bath and stir frequently until cold. Cover the bowl and refrigerate the ice cream base for at least 4 hours.

4. Process the base in an ice cream machine according to the manufacturer's instructions (be careful not to overchurn the ice cream or it will become grainy). Transfer the ice cream to an airtight container and freeze until ready to serve.

1. In a medium saucepan, bring the pomegranate juice and black pepper to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the pears and reduce the heat to medium-low. Poach the pears in the simmering juice until tender, about 15 minutes. Cool completely at room temperature.
2. Transfer the pears, still in the liquid, to an airtight container and refrigerate until ready to serve.

Pour the poaching liquid in a small saucepan and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Continue to boil the liquid until it has reduced by half, about 15 minutes. Pass the syrup through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl and cool.
1. Preheat the oven to 191°C (191°C). Coat the bottom and sides of a 9-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.

2. In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, mix together the butter and sugar on medium speed until creamy and well blended, about 2 minutes. Add the almond flour and mix until blended. Reduce the mixer speed to medium-low and add the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition and scraping down the sides of the bowl as necessary. Add the flour and mix until blended. Scrape the almond mixture into the prepared pan, smoothing it into an even layer. Bake for 18 to 22 minutes, or until golden brown. Place the pan on a wire rack and cool completely.
3. Using a 2-inch-long by 1-inch-wide diamond-shaped pastry cutter, cut out 8 diamonds of baked almond cream. Store in an airtight container until ready to use.

Cut each Poached Pear with Pomegranate in half crosswise and remove the cores from the bottom halves. Place each pear bottom standing up on a plate and top with a slice of Cabrales cheese. Replace the pear tops. Glaze the pears with some of the Pomegranate Sauce, letting some of the sauce drip onto the plates. Place a Baked Almond Diamond on each plate and top with a scoop of Szechuan Pepper Ice Cream.

portobello-mushrooms-in-a-pan-with-mozza.name: Portobello Mushrooms In A Pan With Mozzarella
portobello-mushrooms-in-a-pan-with-mozza.original_name: Μανιτάρια πορτομπέλο στο τηγάνι με μοτσαρέλα
instructions: Clean the mushrooms with fresh cloth and, if large, cut them in half.
Heat a pan over high heat and add a few drops of olive oil and butter.
Add the portobello, thyme, rosemary, salt and freshly ground pepper immediately and set them on high heat for 2-3 minutes until the mushrooms dry and drink all their liquids.
Add the cognac and as soon as the alcohol evaporates completely, pour the liquid mozzarella into the pan broken with your hands into irregular pieces.
Transfer the vessel under strong grill for 1-2 minutes to melt the cheese and become cream.
Brush the bread slices with some oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Toast them in a hot spoon to brown. As warm as they are, rub on their surface the garlic to give all its flavors.
Serve the mushrooms with their white aromatic and creamy sauce and accompany them with the hot toasted slices of baguette.

portuguese-stew-and-economical-recipe-te.name: Portuguese Stew - And Economical Recipe
portuguese-stew-and-economical-recipe-te.original_name: Cozido à portuguesa - Receita fácil e económica

ingredients.item: 500 g  carne de vaca para cozer
500 g  perna de porco sem osso

instructions: Cut the chicken into pieces and season them with salt, as well as beef, ribs, ears and pork legs. Light a large pan with water and salt, add the blond and garlic washed with the peel and let it boil. Add all the meats, leaving the chicken for last. Add also the sausages, previously stung with a fork.

Get the kale and cut it into big pieces. Peel the carrots, turnips and potatoes. With a cinnamon cutter, cut the potatoes in half and the carrots and turnips into pieces. Check the cooking of the meats and remove them as they are cooked.

At the same broth, add the cabbage, potatoes, turnips and carrots and let it cook. Remove them with a skimmer as soon as they're cooked. In a separate pot, pour 500 ml of meat broth and, when boiling, add the loose rice. When cooked, correct the seasonings and remove from the fire.

Heat the rest of the water, dip all the meats and remove them as soon as they are hot. Do the same with the beans and drain it. Cut the meat into pieces and the sausages into thick slices. Eliminate the laurel and garlic, silver all elements on a large platter and serve immediately.

portuguese-style-steaks-with-greens-rice.name: Portuguese-style Steaks With Greens Rice
portuguese-style-steaks-with-greens-rice.original_name: Bifanas à portuguesa com arroz de grelos
instructions: Get the bifanas, put them in a bowl and season them with chopped garlic, sweet pepper, white wine, blond leaves, salt and pepper. Involve and let marinate for 20 minutes.

In the meantime, make the rice: fix the grills, scorch them well in salted water, remove them, pass them by cold water and let it run. Heat the olive oil in a pot, add the chopped onion and garlic teeth and let it shine. Add 1,2 L of water, let it boil, add the rice and the grelos, season with salt and let cook for 18 minutes, stirring from time to time.

Heat a frying pan with the margarine and olive oil, add the sprung bifanas and let them fry on both sides. Add the marinade, boil well until clear, remove from the fire and serve with the rice of grelos.

potato-rolls.name: Potato Rolls
instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water in a bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes.
Mix milk, mashed potatoes, shortening, sugar, and salt together in a bowl.
Add yeast mixture and egg.
Stir in 2 cups flour until incorporated. Stir in remaining 2 ½ cups flour to make a soft dough.
Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 7 minutes.
Place dough into a lightly greased bowl and turn once to coat all sides with oil.
Cover the bowl and set in a warm place until dough has doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch dough down and shape into a ball. Cover the bowl and let rest for 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease two baking sheets.
Shape dough into 24 rolls. Place rolls onto the prepared baking sheets and let rise until dough springs back when you touch the side of a roll with your fingertip, 25 to 40 minutes.
Bake rolls in the preheated oven until golden brown, 10 to 12 minutes.

praia-da-vieira-seafood-rice-recipe-tele.name: Praia Da Vieira Seafood Rice Recipe
praia-da-vieira-seafood-rice-recipe-tele.original_name: Receita de arroz de marisco da Praia da Vieira
instructions: Cook the shellfish in abundant water seasoned with salt. Remove and dip in cold water with ice. Book the cooking water.
Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e refogue-os no azeite, juntamente com a malagueta cortada em rodelas.
Add the rice and let it fry slightly. Add the tomato pulp and cover with the boiling water of the shellfish (it should be a little more than twice the volume of rice). Let it cook for 7 minutes.
Adicione o marisco e deixe cozinhar por mais 3 minutos. Sirva o arroz de imediato, salpicado de coentros picados.

prepare-a-balsamic-vinaigrette-in-just-a.name: Prepare A Balsamic Vinaigrette In Just A Few Minutes
prepare-a-balsamic-vinaigrette-in-just-a.original_name: Prepara una vinagreta balsámica en pocos minutos

ingredients.item: 4 tazas de vino tinto de buena calidad
1 taza de vinagre de vino tinto
1 taza de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

instructions: We started by preparing the balsamic vinegar. Gather the red wine into a large saucepan and put it under medium heat and lead to boiling, and then reduce fire to low to maintain a soft boiling. Cooking for about 15-20 minutes to reduce by half the amount of fluid.

Incorporates sugar into the saucer, stirring constantly to ensure that it completely dissolve. It keeps cooking with a low heat, sometimes stirring, till the mixture gets a thick and pounding consistency.
Add the vinegar of red wine to the mixture and remove well. At this point, add the rosemary and laurel leaf to give an aromatic touch to your balsamic vinegar.

It allows the mixture to continue to cook with slow heat, stirring from time to time, until it reaches the desired consistency. That can take at least 1-2 hours. Keep in mind that the balsamic vinegar will continue to be thickened while cold, so it doesn't have to get to final consistency while cooking.

Remove the pan from the fire and let the homemade balsamic vinegar cool at room temperature. Remove the herbs from the mixture and pass the vinegar through a coffee sewer or filter to remove any solid residue.
Transfer your homemade balsamic vinegar to a dark glass bottle to preserve its quality.
Now we have to conduct the vinegar. In a bowl, mix balsamic vinegar, minced garlic, Dijon mustard and honey.
It slowly adds extra virgin olive oil while constantly mixing to emulsify the vinegar and achieve smooth and homogenous consistency.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, adjusting to your personal preferences.

prepare-a-banana-split-in-just-10-minute.name: Prepare A Banana Split In Just 10 Minutes
prepare-a-banana-split-in-just-10-minute.original_name: Prepara un banana split clásico en solo 10 minutos
instructions: Iniciamos nuestra receta pelando y cortando la banaba en dos partes a lo largo. Tal como indica el audiovisual.
In a container we put the banana previously cut onto the sides and add the three balls of ice cream at the centre of the container, one next to the other.
Una vez listo, agrega crema batida sobre las bolas de helado. Puedes jugar con la crema, la idea es colocarla sobre el helado y la banana, a los lados y encima de cada una.
After you put the whipped cream proceeds to decorate with cherries in syrup.
Baits with chocolate syrup to taste and ends dessert with minced nuts.
Enjoy!

prepare-a-delicious-arabic-christmas-ric.name: Prepare A Delicious Arabic Christmas Rice
prepare-a-delicious-arabic-christmas-ric.original_name: Prepara un delicioso arroz árabe navideño

2 cdas de cebolla blanca finamente picada

En una olla mediana, derrite la mantequilla junto con el aceite de oliva a fuego medio.
Add minced onion and damper slowly until clear and fragrant, without gilt.
Incorpora el ajo rallado y cocina solo unos segundos para evitar que se queme.
Add almonds, nuts and pines. Jumps for 1 to 2 minutes until they are slightly golden.
Add raisins and dry cranberries, mix well to be hydrated with hot fat.
Incorpora el arroz y mezcla cuidadosamente para que se impregne de los aromas.
Add cinnamon, cardamom, cumin, nail, salt and pepper. It's been mixed around.
Fold the hot stock, add the orange fringes and lead to boiling.
Drop the fire, cover and cook for 12 to 15 minutes until the rice's tender and the liquid's been absorbed.
Apaga el fuego y deja reposar tapado 5 minutos.
Esponja el arroz con un tenedor y termina con perejil o hierbabuena fresca.

prepare-a-delicious-truffle-nougat-comed.original_name: Prepara un rico turrón de trufa

Fold the mold with billing paper or transparent film. Fold the mixture and smooth the surface with a spatula.
Let cool at room temperature 30 minutes and then refrigerate at least 2 hours till firm.

At a bowl, tighten the tomatoes previously steamed and add to the previous mixture and cook till reduced and separate oil.

Introduce pumpkin and lentils to the mixture, adding water as necessary to achieve the desired consistency.
Cooking at low heat till pumpkin's tender and flavors merge.
Ajusta la lasa y sirve caliente, decora con unas hojas de cilantro fresco.

prepare-some-delicious-duck-skewers-with.original_name: Prepara unas ricas brochetas de pato con salsa Hoisin

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the hoisin salsa, honey, soybean salsa, sesame oil, pitted ginger, chopped garlic, salt and pepper.

Precalienta la parrilla o el horno a temperatura media-alta.
Tackle the seawold duck cubes into the clasp sticks and distribute them uniformly.
It cooks the pits in the grill or oven for about 8-10 minutes, sometimes turning them and clicking with the remaining marinade.
Withdraw the pits from the fire as soon as the duck is cooked and slightly golden from the outside.

prepare-these-delicious-cookies-with-jam.original_name: Prepara estas ricas galletas con mermelada
instructions: Start the recipe and preheat the oven at 180 ° C
In a bowl, add butter and bate with an electrical or manual beaker while soft and ointment.
Incorporate sugar and mixture until integrated.
Produce and add an egg and mix quickly so that you have a smooth texture.
Agrega a vainilla e incorpora de a poco la harina de trigo, mezcla muy bien hasta que se integren y te quede una masa suave, pero manejable.
Engrasa un poco tus manos y ve formando las galletas, aplana un poco hasta que te queden gorditas. Hunde tu dedo en el medio para abrir un espacio, el cual rellenaremos con la mermelada.

Let your cookies stand and put the jam in the middle when they're cold.

pumpkin-crepes-with-fontina-cheese-sauce.name: Pumpkin Crepes With Fontina Cheese Sauce

ingredients.prep: white and light green parts only, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Beat egg with a hand mixer in a bowl. Slowly add flour and salt, alternating with milk, mixing well between additions. Add melted butter and mix until smooth. Cover and refrigerate batter for 1 hour.

Heat a small, 6- to 7-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat and brush with oil. Pour 1/4 cup of the crepe batter into pan, tilting to coat surface completely. Cook until crepes are dry on the surface, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Repeat with remaining batter, brushing pan with oil between crepes as needed, to make 4 to 5 crepes total.

Heat butter and olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add pumpkin and leek; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring frequently, until leek is translucent and pumpkin is tender, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove from heat, cover, and let cool for about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine fontina cheese and half-and-half in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Stir frequently until cheese has melted and sauce is smooth, about 5 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Spray a casserole dish with cooking spray.

Divide the leek and pumpkin filling down the center of the crepes and fold the sides over the filling. Place filled crepes into the prepared casserole dish. Pour cheese sauce on top and add a few rosemary leaves.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Serve immediately.

pumpkin-halloween-cupcakes-pequerecetas.name: Pumpkin Halloween Cupcakes

ingredients.item: 1 cup of baked pumpkin purée (240 g)
250 g de harina para todo uso
225 g de queso crema a temperatura ambiente
55 g de mantequilla sin sal a temperatura ambiente
Chocolates alargados para el rabo de la calabaza

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 ° C (375ºF). Prepare a mold for muffins by put capsules into every concavity.
In a large bowl, mix pumpkin purée, vegetable oil, eggs, sugar and milk until well combined.

In another bowl, mix flour for every use, baking powder, sodium bicarbonate, salt, ground cinnamon, ground ginger and ground nutmeg. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix them up till they are well combined.
Vierte la masa en el molde para muffins preparado. Hornea durante unos 20 minutos o hasta que un palillo insertado en el centro salga limpio.
Let the muffins cool in the mold for a few minutes before transferring them to a grid to completely cool. Once cold we remove the muffins with care.

In a big bowl, beat the cream and butter with an electrical mixer till they are soft and spongy. It gradually adds tipped and bates powder sugar until they are well combined. Add the vanilla and some drops of an orange food dye and bat till well combined.

We put the frying onto one of the pumpkin muffins, and we turn the other onto them, as seen in the picture with some frying we stick our eyes with sugar cawe onto the pumpkin muffins with chocolate. We put some sugars up his mouth.

pumpkin-lasagna.name: Pumpkin Lasagna

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume or the same weight
cut into 1/4 to 1/2 inch cubes or lardons
tough ends trimmed, cut crosswise into 1/2-inch strips
plus more for greasing baking dish

ingredients.item: Fresh homemade plain egg pasta or store-bought fresh lasagna noodles
ingredients.prep: or 2 boxes dry or no-boil lasagna noodles (see note)

ingredients.item: Vegetable oil for oiling lasagna sheets

instructions: For the Pumpkin Filling: In a large skillet, melt butter, shallot, and sage over medium heat. Once melted, continue to cook, swirling skillet occasionally until butter is browned and shallot is softened, 3 to 5 minutes. Quickly transfer mixture to a large bowl and let cool slightly, about 5 minutes. Do not wipe out skillet.
Whisk pumpkin purée, 1 egg, and salt into butter mixture; set aside while preparing rest of filling components.

For the Swiss Chard: In now-empty skillet, add pancetta. Cook over medium heat until fat is rendered and pancetta is golden but still retains a slight chew, 8 to 12 minutes. Add garlic, red pepper flakes, and thyme, and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in chard until well combined. Cover pan and cook until chard is wilted, 2 to 5 minutes. Uncover, stir, and cook until mostly dry, about 2 minutes longer. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside to cool.

For the Besciamella alla Fontina: In a medium saucepan, melt butter over medium-high heat (do not allow it to brown). Add flour and whisk to form a paste. Continue to cook, stirring, until raw flour scent is gone, about 1 minute. Whisking constantly, add milk in a thin, steady stream, or in increments of a couple of tablespoons at a time, whisking thoroughly and getting into all corners of the pan to maintain a homogeneous texture. Sauce will initially become very thick, then get very thin once all the milk is added.

Heat, stirring, until sauce comes to a simmer and begins to thicken slightly. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring, until sauce is just thick enough to coat the back of a wooden spoon, about 3 minutes.

Season with salt and pepper to taste. Whisk in nutmeg. If any lumps form, simply whisk thoroughly to remove them and smooth out sauce, or use a hand blender or countertop blender if lumps are particularly large or tough. Stir in 6 ounces shredded fontina cheese until melted. Use béchamel sauce right away, or transfer to a container and press a piece of plastic wrap over surface of sauce to prevent a skin from forming and keep warm until ready to use.

If Using Homemade Pasta: Follow our recipe for homemade fresh pasta through step 10 (you will end up with long sheets of fresh pasta), doubling the quantity to yield 2 pounds total (this will make more pasta than you will need, but it's best to have extra and avoid running out midway through assembly). Cut those sheets into roughly 8-inch-long rectangles.

If Using Homemade or Store-Bought Fresh or Dried Lasagna Noodles: Prepare a large ice bath. In a pot of salted boiling water, cook pasta, working in batches if necessary, until al dente (this will vary depending on the pasta you use, but for store-bought, it's typically about 1 minute less than package instructions). Then, use a spider or mesh strainer to transfer immediately to ice bath to cool.
If Using No-Boil Pasta: Soak it in warm water for 30 minutes to partially hydrate it, then drain on paper towels or kitchen towels.

Drain pasta well, then rub each sheet lightly on both sides with vegetable oil (to prevent sticking). You can hold the cooked pasta sheets for up to 3 hours, but if you're doing this, it's best to lay them out on a parchment-lined baking sheet, with layers of plastic wrap between the layers of pasta (once again, to prevent sticking).

To Assemble and Bake Lasagna: Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C). Grease a 9- by-13-inch baking dish with butter. Spoon a thin, even layer of béchamel on bottom of baking dish, then lay down a layer of lasagna noodles; it's OK if they overlap somewhat, but you can cut any sheets that are too large to avoid excessive doubling up.

Top pasta with a third of pumpkin mixture, using a large spoon or offset spatula, spread it into a thin layer (thin enough that you can see the pasta through the sauce in some spots). Top evenly with a third of cooked Swiss chard. Drizzle a third of remaining béchamel all over chard, spread it into an even layer, then top with a showering of grated Parmigiano-Reggiano. Repeat this layering process 2 more times with pasta, pumpkin mixture, chard, béchamel, and grated Parmigiano. Sprinkle top with remaining 2 ounces shredded fontina and remaining grated Parmigiano.
Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet and bake lasagna until bubbling and browned on top, about 35 minutes. Let rest 20 minutes, then slice and serve.

pumpkin-muffins-with-streusel-topping.name: Pumpkin Muffins With Streusel Topping
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 18-cup muffin tin or line cups with paper liners.

Combine 2 ½ cups flour, ½ cup oats, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl. Whisk pumpkin puree, 1 cup brown sugar, white sugar, vegetable oil, eggs, applesauce, and vanilla extract together in a separate large bowl. Stir flour mixture into pumpkin mixture to combine: fold in raisins.
Beat ¼ cup brown sugar with butter in a bowl until creamy and smooth. Whisk 2 tablespoons oats and 2 tablespoons flour, using a fork, into sugar-butter mixture until crumbly.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each ⅔ full. Sprinkle with streusel topping.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean, 25 to 35 minutes.

pumpkin-pie-with-yellow-pumpkin-savory-a.name: Pumpkin Pie With Yellow Pumpkin (savory)

ingredients.item: 1/2 kg of flour for all uses
1 cup of water lukewarm (as much as it takes)
1/2 cup of rice glaze or carolina
1/2 kg of flour for all uses
1 cup of water lukewarm (as much as it takes)
1/2 cup of rice glaze or carolina

instructions: Shake the flour in a bowl.
We puddle in half and add salt, olive oil and vinegar.
A little while, add the water until we have a dough that does not stick in the hands.
Divide the dough into four. We make dough balls.
Cover it well and let it rest for 30 minutes.

pumpkin-squares-with-cream-cheese-telecu.name: Pumpkin Squares With Cream Cheese
pumpkin-squares-with-cream-cheese-telecu.original_name: Quadradinhos de abóbora com queijo creme
instructions: Cut the pumpkin into pieces and bake them in boiling water, seasoned with a pinch of salt. Remove it from the fire, drain it very well and squeeze it so that it runs out of water.

Line a board with vegetable paper and grease it with margarine. In a bowl, mix the pumpkin puree with the spices, the sugar and the eggs and beat it fine. Add the bicarbonate and flour, hit again and then lie on the board.
Prepare the cover: in a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese with sugar and yolks and put it in a pastry bag.
Lay the cream on the dough, forming effects to taste, and bring it to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 35 to 40 minutes. Remove, let cool, unshape and serve, cut into squares.

pumpkin-sticky-toffee-pudding.name: Pumpkin Sticky Toffee Pudding
instructions: Make the cake: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Line an 8x10-inch baking dish with parchment paper, and set aside.
Place the dates, milk, melted butter, baking soda, and baking powder in a medium bowl. Stir twice, and let stand for about 15 minutes, or until the dates soften.
Meanwhile, whisk together the flour, cinnamon, pie spice, ginger, allspice, and salt in a large bowl until combined. Set aside.
Using a fork, gently mash the date mixture into a chunky paste. Add the egg, pumpkin puree, brown sugar, yogurt, molasses, and vanilla. Whisk together until completely combined.

Whisk the date mixture into the flour mixture until well combined and no flour bits remain. Stir in the walnuts if using. Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish. Bake for 40–50 minutes, until a wooden pick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean with no crumbs.

Meanwhile, make the pumpkin toffee: Place the butter, brown sugar, pumpkin puree, cream, molasses, pie spice, vanilla, ginger, and salt in a small saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Simmer, whisking constantly, until the ingredients are smooth and combined, about 3 minutes. Reduce the heat to medium-low, and simmer, whisking occasionally, until the mixture is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon, 5–7 minutes. Remove from heat.

Remove the cake from the oven. Using a chopstick, poke 20 holes all over the cake’s surface down to the bottom of the cake. Let the cake cool for 15 minutes. Pour two-thirds of the pumpkin toffee (about 1 cup) all over the cake.
Let the cake soak and cool for 10 minutes. Slice and serve with ice cream and the remaining pumpkin toffee.
Enjoy!

pate-sucree.name: Pâte Sucrée
instructions: Whisk egg yolks and cream in a small bowl; set aside. Pulse flour, butter, sugar, and salt in a food processor until a coarse meal forms. With machine running, gradually add cream mixture; blend just to combine (do not overwork dough or crust will be tough).

Transfer dough to a large work surface. Knead just to incorporate, 4-5 turns. Divide dough in half; shape each half into a 1-inch-thick disk and wrap in plastic. Chill until firm, at least 2 hours. DO AHEAD Crust can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before rolling out. Crust can also be frozen for up to 4 months. Thaw overnight in refrigerator before rolling out.

ze-do-pipo-fish-fillets-teleculinaria.name: Pipo Fish Fillets Zé
ze-do-pipo-fish-fillets-teleculinaria.original_name: Filetes de pescada à Zé do Pipo
instructions: Cut the fillets in half and season them with salt, pepper and lemon juice. Peel off the onions and garlic, cut the onions into thin half-moons and pick the garlic. Put in a pot the olive oil, the laurel leaf, the onion and garlic, take it to the fire and let it saute until the onion becomes soft. Remove and reserve.

Prepare the mashed potatoes: peel the potatoes, cut them in half and cook them in salty water. Drain them and turn them into mashed potatoes. Add the butter, stir, then add the milk and egg shakes, season with nutmeg and stir well.
Pass the fillets for flour and then the egg shakes. Fry them in abundant hot oil and drain them on absorbent paper.
On an oven tray, put the onions and on top of the steaks and chopped pickles. Cover the fillets with the mayonnaise. Lay the mashed potatoes around, using a pastry bag with frizzy mouth.
Take the tray to the oven, preheated at 180oC, until the surface is gratined. Sprinkle with chopped parsley, decorate with black olives and serve next.
